metadata.name: arisan_protocol
metadata.description: Decentralized Arisan Protocol on Solana with Delayed Payout & Dynamic Reputation

instructions.name: claim_unlocked
docs: Claim the next unlocked portion of locked funds (requires paid dues).

instructions.name: draw_winner
docs: Draw a winner and execute delayed payout based on reputation score.

accounts.name: winner_reputation
docs: Winner's reputation PDA — mutable so we can update score after payout.

accounts.name: vault
docs: Vault holding the USDC pool.

accounts.name: locked_payout
docs: The locked payout PDA for this winner+group combo.

instructions.name: initialize_group
docs: Create a new arisan group with a USDC vault.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: The USDC mint (or any SPL token mint.

accounts.name: vault
docs: The vault token account (PDA-owned) to hold USDC deposits.

instructions.name: join_group
docs: Join an existing arisan group. Creates a reputation PDA if new user.

accounts.name: reputation
docs: User reputation PDA — init_if_needed so new users get one automatically.

instructions.name: pay_dues
docs: Pay dues for the current round (USDC transfer to vault).

accounts.name: user_token_account
docs: User's USDC token account (source of funds).

accounts.name: vault
docs: The vault token account (destination).

accounts.name: reputation
docs: User's reputation PDA — updated on each successful payment.

instructions.name: slash_defaulter
docs: Slash a defaulting winner and redistribute their locked funds.

accounts.name: distribution_account
docs: Account to receive slashed funds for redistribution.

errors.name: InvalidMemberCount
errors.msg: Member count must be between 3 and 20

errors.name: InvalidDuesAmount
errors.msg: Dues amount must be greater than 0

errors.name: GroupAlreadyLocked
errors.msg: Group is already locked, no new members

errors.name: AlreadyMember
errors.msg: User is already a member of this group

errors.name: NotAMember
errors.msg: User is not a member of this group

errors.name: AlreadyPaidThisRound
errors.msg: Already paid dues for this round

errors.name: NotAllPaid
errors.msg: Not all members have paid dues for this round

errors.name: NoEligibleMembers
errors.msg: No eligible members for the draw

errors.name: MustPayDuesFirst
errors.msg: Must pay dues first before claiming

errors.name: NoActiveMembers
errors.msg: No active members to distribute to

types.name: ArisanGroup
docs: State of the arisan group — stored as a PDA.

fields.name: admin
docs: The group admin (creator).

fields.name: usdc_mint
docs: The USDC mint address.

fields.name: vault
docs: The vault token account (PDA-owned) holding USDC.

fields.name: dues_amount
docs: Amount of dues each member must pay per round (in USDC smallest unit).

fields.name: max_members
docs: Maximum number of members in this group.

fields.name: member_count
docs: Current active member count.

fields.name: current_round
docs: Current round number (starts at 1).

fields.name: total_rounds
docs: Total number of rounds (= max_members, one winner per round).

fields.name: is_active
docs: Whether the arisan group is currently active.

fields.name: is_locked
docs: Whether all members have joined and the group is locked for play.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for the group PDA.

fields.name: vault_bump
docs: Bump seed for the vault PDA.

fields.name: members
docs: Members list.

types.name: LockedPayout
docs: Tracks the locked portion of a winner's payout.
Created when someone wins and partially unlocked as they keep paying dues.

fields.name: winner
docs: The winner's wallet.

fields.name: group
docs: The arisan group this payout belongs to.

fields.name: total_locked
docs: Total locked amount (USDC smallest unit).

fields.name: amount_claimed
docs: Amount already claimed/unlocked.

fields.name: unlock_per_round
docs: Amount unlocked per qualifying round.

fields.name: remaining_rounds
docs: Remaining rounds the winner must pay to fully unlock.

fields.name: is_resolved
docs: Whether this payout has been fully resolved (claimed or slashed).

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for the PDA.

types.name: MemberStatus
docs: Status of each member within a group.

fields.name: wallet
docs: The member's wallet pubkey.

fields.name: paid_current_round
docs: Whether this member has paid dues for the current round.

fields.name: has_won
docs: Whether this member has already won a payout.

types.name: UserReputation
docs: On-chain reputation PDA — unique per user, portable across groups.
This is the "credit score" that determines delayed payout percentages.

fields.name: user
docs: The user's wallet pubkey.

fields.name: completed_groups
docs: Total arisan groups completed successfully.

fields.name: successful_rounds
docs: Total rounds where the user paid on time.

fields.name: defaulted_rounds
docs: Total rounds where the user defaulted (missed payment).

fields.name: score
docs: Reputation score (0 - 100). Higher = more trusted.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for the PDA.
